creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
Update patch to fix universal build with graphics/py-python-poppler-qt5, and 32-bit builds with multimedia/qt6-multimedia and www/qt6-webengine.

https://people.freebsd.org/~jhale/patches/0002-Qt6-Update-to-6.8.1.patch

The rest of the known failures have been dealt with in main.
